programmes.name: TRIP (Tax Rebate for International Productions)

annualBudget.display: ~EUR120M (total tax expenditure for C2I/TRIP combined ~EUR579M in 2026)

minSpend.display: EUR250K eligible spend in France, or 50% of world budget if <EUR500K; min 5 shooting days for live action

cap.display: EUR30M per project

deadlines.notes: Agrément delivered by CNC; rebate paid 6-9 months after audited cost reports

programmes.eligibility: Foreign productions shooting in France via a French production services company (existing company, subsidiary, or SPV). Must pass a cultural test. Documentaries, commercials, and reality TV excluded. 2026 reform: above-the-line costs (including non-European actor salaries) now eligible.

programmes.name: Credit d'Impot Cinema (Cinema Tax Credit)

rate.display: 30% for French-language films; 20% for foreign-language films (with artistic justification)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR579M total tax expenditure (all CNC tax credits combined, 2026)

minSpend.display: Eligible spend capped at 80% of production budget

cap.display: EUR30M per film

deadlines.frequency: Rolling (provisional agrément must be obtained before first day of shooting)
deadlines.notes: Agrément provisoire required before shooting begins; agrément définitif after completion

programmes.eligibility: French production companies (sociétés commerciales) subject to IS (corporate tax) acting as producteur délégué (max 2 per film). Film must qualify for CNC automatic support. Public aid cumulation capped at 50% of budget (60% in certain cases). Eco-conditionality applies since Jan 2024.

programmes.name: Credit d'Impot Audiovisuel (Audiovisual Tax Credit)

rate.display: 25% for fiction, documentary, animation; 10% for live performance adaptations

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR579M total tax expenditure (all CNC tax credits combined, 2026)

minSpend.display: Varies by genre (e.g. documentary: cost >EUR2,333/min and eligible spend >=EUR2,000/min)

cap.display: Per-minute caps vary by genre; see detail fields

deadlines.frequency: Rolling (provisional agrément before start of principal photography)
deadlines.notes: Agrément provisoire must be obtained before shooting begins

programmes.eligibility: French production companies (sociétés commerciales) subject to IS, acting as producteur délégué. Works must benefit from CNC Fonds de Soutien Audiovisuel. Genres: fiction, documentary, animation, live performance adaptation.

programmes.name: Credit d'Impot International (C2I)

rate.display: 30% base; 40% for VFX-heavy works (French VFX spend >EUR2M)

annualBudget.display: Combined with TRIP in EUR579M total (2026); C2I prorogated to 31 Dec 2028

minSpend.display: EUR250K eligible spend in France, or 50% of world budget if <EUR500K; min 5 shooting days for live action

cap.display: EUR30M per project

deadlines.notes: CNC Service de l'attractivité delivers agrément

programmes.eligibility: French executive production company on behalf of a foreign production company. Fiction or animation only (no documentaries, commercials, institutional). Must pass cultural test. VFX-only projects eligible if >=15% of shots digitally processed.
programmes.notes: The C2I is the tax-credit mechanism underlying the TRIP cash rebate. Prorogated until 31 Dec 2028.

programmes.name: Avance sur Recettes avant Realisation (Advance on Receipts - Pre-production)

rate.display: Interest-free repayable advance; average EUR500K, max EUR700K per film

annualBudget.display: ~EUR29M/year (avant + apres combined)

minSpend.display: N/A (film must be in French or French regional language)

cap.display: EUR700K per film (average EUR500K)

deadlines.notes: ~700 applications/year; ~52 films selected before realisation in 2025. 3 commissions: ASR1 (1st films), ASR2 (2nd-3rd films), ASR3 (4th+ films)

programmes.eligibility: Authors (French/EU nationals or resident foreigners) or French production companies (producteur délégué). Film must be in French or French regional language. Repayable from box office receipts (25% above EUR50K, up to 80% of advance). Eco-conditionality since Jan 2024.

programmes.name: Avance sur Recettes apres Realisation (Advance on Receipts - Post-production)

annualBudget.display: Included in EUR29M/year combined ASR budget; ~24 films selected after realisation in 2025

minSpend.display: Film must show financing deficit beyond producer salary

cap.display: Determined case-by-case by CNC president after committee review

deadlines.notes: Must have a distribution contract for theatrical release

programmes.eligibility: French producteur délégué with completed film. Must demonstrate financing deficit. Distribution contract required. Eco-conditionality applies.

programmes.name: Soutien Automatique a la Production de Long Metrage (Automatic Support - Cinema)

rate.display: Calculated from box office, TV broadcasts, and home video sales of previous films

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR810.3M total CNC Fonds de Soutien (2026)

minSpend.display: N/A (generated automatically from exploitation of previous works)

cap.display: No fixed cap; amount depends on commercial performance of previous films

programmes.eligibility: French production companies with previous films holding agrément de production. Funds credited to producer's CNC account and must be reinvested in new feature film production (or short films/development).

programmes.name: Compte Automatique Audiovisuel - COSIP (Automatic Support - Audiovisual)

rate.display: Generated from TV broadcasts of previous works

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR810.3M total CNC Fonds de Soutien (2026)

minSpend.display: Account opening thresholds: Fiction EUR200K, Documentary EUR80K, Animation EUR200K

cap.display: No fixed cap; up to 40% of account balance can be used for development

deadlines.frequency: Continuous (diffusion declarations due quarterly; annual recap by 15 January)

programmes.eligibility: French commercial production companies (sociétés commerciales) with works previously broadcast on French TV channels and recognised as reference works by CNC.

programmes.name: Aide aux Cinemas du Monde (ACM) (World Cinema Support)

annualBudget.display: ~60 projects supported per year across 4 sessions

minSpend.display: Films >=EUR2.5M budget must obtain CNC agrément de production (EUR4M threshold for animation)

cap.display: Before realisation: EUR300K (EUR500K for French-initiative films >=EUR2.5M budget). After realisation: EUR70K

deadlines.notes: New rules for projects deposited from 1 Jan 2026 onward

programmes.eligibility: French production company in co-production with foreign company. Director must be foreign national (or French national filming in a foreign language). Film language must be an official/used language of the director's country. Open to fiction, animation, documentary de création for theatrical release. Cumulative with avance sur recettes, regional aids, and C2I (up to 50% of budget, 80% in specific cases).

programmes.name: Fonds de Soutien Cinema - Aide a la Production (Ile-de-France)

rate.display: Investment grant (non-repayable since 2025); % of budget and IDF spend

annualBudget.display: EUR16M total for cinema + audiovisual (largest regional fund in France)

minSpend.display: 50% of budget spent in IDF (French/European projects); 30-40% for European co-productions

cap.display: No published fixed cap per project; no numerus clausus

deadlines.cinema2026: Open until 22 April 2026; next session from 23 April 2026
deadlines.notes: For live-action: registration before first day of shooting

programmes.eligibility: European production companies. Feature films (>=60 min), fiction, animation, documentary de création. For French/European projects: 50% spend + 50% shooting in IDF. Governed by délibération CP2024-247.

programmes.name: Fonds de Soutien Cinema International (Ile-de-France)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR16M total IDF cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: 30-40% of budget spent in IDF depending on configuration

cap.display: EUR250K per project

deadlines.cinema2026: Open until 17 June 2026; next session from 18 June 2026

programmes.eligibility: International co-productions where the French share is minority. Feature films (>=60 min), fiction, animation, documentary de création. Non-repayable investment grant since 2025.

programmes.name: Fonds de Soutien Audiovisuel - Aide a la Production (Ile-de-France)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR16M total IDF cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: 50% of budget spent in IDF (French/European); 30-40% for European co-productions

cap.display: No published fixed cap per project

programmes.eligibility: European production companies. Eligible: animation series (min 2min/ep, cumulative 60min), multi-part documentaries (min 26min/ep, cumulative 90min), web fiction/animation (unitaire >=60min or series >=5min/ep with cumulative >=100min).

programmes.name: Soutien a la Creation et a la Production de Long Metrage de Fiction (Region Sud PACA)

annualBudget.display: Part of Region Sud cinema/audiovisual budget (est. ~EUR5-6M total)

minSpend.display: 100% of grant amount must be spent in region (within 80% of production budget)

cap.display: Writing: EUR5K-7K; Development: EUR10K-15K (EUR15K-20K intl); Production: contact Region for exact cap

deadlines.notes: Dates apply to cinema long metrage fiction and animation

programmes.eligibility: Production companies (sociétés commerciales, min EUR45K capital). Must meet 2 of 4 territorial criteria (author domiciled in region, geographic/cultural link, regional HQ, prior regional aid). Max 3 concurrent regional aids without progress.

programmes.name: Soutien a la Creation et a la Production de Fictions Audiovisuelles (Region Sud PACA)

annualBudget.display: Part of Region Sud cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: 100% of grant in regional spend

cap.display: Unitaire (>=60min): EUR40K-100K; Series (>=3 eps, >=26min cumul): EUR40K-150K

programmes.eligibility: Production companies meeting CNC FSA criteria. Territorial anchoring requirements apply.

programmes.name: Soutien a la Creation et a la Production d'Oeuvres Documentaires (Region Sud PACA)

annualBudget.display: Part of Region Sud cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: 20% of budget in confirmed financing (excl. producer share and tax credit) at time of deposit

cap.display: Contact Region for exact production grant amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies or associations whose main activity is audiovisual production. Must have broadcaster commitment at deposit. Author must have prior festival/distribution/broadcast credits. Must meet 2 of 3 territorial criteria.

programmes.name: Soutien a la Creation et a la Production d'Oeuvres d'Animation (Region Sud PACA)

annualBudget.display: Part of Region Sud cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: 10% of budget in confirmed financing for short animation

cap.display: Contact Region for exact amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Short and long animation, animation series.

programmes.name: Soutien a la Production de Court Metrage de Fiction (Region Sud PACA)

annualBudget.display: Part of Region Sud cinema/audiovisual budget

minSpend.display: Regional spend requirements apply

cap.display: Contact Region for exact amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Short fiction films as defined by Code du cinéma.

programmes.name: Fonds de Soutien au Cinema et a l'Audiovisuel - Aide a la Production (Nouvelle-Aquitaine)

annualBudget.display: EUR6.3M (Region share); ~EUR10M total with Departements and Bordeaux Metropole

minSpend.display: 120% of aid for LM fiction/doc/CM; 160% for animation and TV fiction

cap.display: LM fiction: EUR200K (EUR150K for intl co-prod); Development: EUR40K

programmes.eligibility: Production companies with projects for feature films, shorts, or audiovisual works for professional public distribution. Committee of 3-5 professionals per genre. Projects assessed on artistic merit and regional strategy alignment.

programmes.name: FACCA - Aide a la Production de Court-Metrage (Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes)

annualBudget.display: Part of FACCA budget (~EUR1.6M for FACCA; ~EUR6.8M total regional cinema budget)

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in regional spend

cap.display: EUR15K-45K per project

programmes.eligibility: Commercial production companies. Short fiction, animation, documentary. Under regime SA.112218 (2024-2026).

programmes.name: FACCA - Aide a la Production Audiovisuelle Documentaire (Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes)

annualBudget.display: Part of FACCA budget (~EUR1.6M)

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in regional spend

cap.display: Cumulated development + production aid capped at production aid ceiling

sessions2026: Session 1: deposit by 12 Dec 2025, committee late Feb 2026
Session 2: deposit by 17 Apr 2026, committee mid-Jun 2026

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Documentary de création or audiovisual adaptation of live performance. CNC partnership.

programmes.name: Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Cinema - Coproduction Long Metrage
programmes.governingBody: Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Cinema (with Region AuRA and CNC)

annualBudget.display: ~EUR3M+ annual investment capacity (Region + CNC + recettes)

minSpend.display: Project must have >=20% financing secured (excl. producer share)

cap.display: Average EUR220K per film; 12-15 films co-produced per year

programmes.eligibility: Production companies eligible for CNC agrément des investissements. Feature films (live action, animation, documentary) with territorial link to Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programmes.name: Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Cinema - Soutien a l'Ecriture et au Developpement

rate.display: Selective grant for 1st, 2nd or 3rd feature film

annualBudget.display: ~8 projects/year

minSpend.display: N/A

cap.display: EUR20K per project

programmes.eligibility: Production companies with first, second or third feature film projects. Audiovisual fiction and animation.

programmes.name: Aide a la Creation Audiovisuelle - Production Cinema (Occitanie)

annualBudget.display: ~EUR4.5M/year (+ EUR720K ICC fund)

minSpend.display: Regional spend on eligible workforce and technical services based in Occitanie

cap.display: LM Fiction/Animation: EUR75K-250K; LM Documentary: EUR30K-120K

programmes.eligibility: Production déléguée or co-production déléguée. Must meet CNC soutien automatique/sélectif criteria and seek broadcaster commitment. Fiction, animation, documentary. Device valid until 31 Dec 2026.

programmes.name: Aide a la Creation Audiovisuelle - Production TV (Occitanie)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR4.5M total regional cinema/AV budget

minSpend.display: Regional spend requirements apply

cap.display: Doc TV: EUR15K-60K; Serie Doc: EUR15K-120K; Fiction unitaire TV: EUR40K-120K; Serie Fiction TV: EUR40K-250K; Animation unitaire TV: EUR26K-120K; Serie Animation TV: EUR26K-250K

deadlines.frequency: 3-4 sessions/year depending on genre (same calendar as cinema)

programmes.eligibility: Same as cinema production aid. Must seek broadcaster/web-diffuser commitment.

programmes.name: FACCA - Production Long Metrage Independant (Bretagne)

annualBudget.display: EUR4.09M total FACCA budget (2025); 111 projects across all stages

minSpend.display: Min 10% of film budget + 120% of aid in Bretagne spend (higher tiers: 25%/130% or 35%/100%)

cap.display: Contact Region for exact production cap; development: EUR20K (LM), EUR12K (AV)

programmes.eligibility: French production companies. Must obtain CNC agrément des investissements. Fiction and animation long metrage. Shooting must not have started before deposit. Max 2 development aids per producer per year.

programmes.name: FACCA - Production Court Metrage (Bretagne)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR4.09M total FACCA

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in Bretagne spend

cap.display: Contact Region for exact amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Short fiction, animation, documentary.

programmes.name: FACCA - Documentaire (Bretagne)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR4.09M total FACCA

minSpend.display: Development: 100% of aid; Production: 160% of aid in Bretagne spend

cap.display: Contact Region for exact amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Documentary de création.

programmes.name: Fonds Audiovisuel de Bretagne (FAB)

rate.display: Selective grant for projects of cultural/heritage interest

annualBudget.display: Limited envelope (small number of projects)

minSpend.display: Bretagne territorial link required

cap.display: Contact Region for amounts

programmes.eligibility: Projects not selected by FACCA but with cultural/heritage interest for the territory.

programmes.name: Fonds d'Aide a l'Expression Audiovisuelle en Langue Bretonne (FALB)

annualBudget.display: Dedicated envelope

minSpend.display: Must be in Breton language

cap.display: Contact Region for amounts

programmes.eligibility: Productions and dubbing in Breton language.

programmes.name: Fonds Cinema-TV (Pictanovo / Hauts-de-France)

rate.display: Selective grant; up to 50% of production costs (60% for cross-border, 100% for difficult works)

annualBudget.display: EUR7.2M production fund; EUR8.75M total (2026 projected)

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in regional spend (within 80% of production budget)

cap.display: LM fiction: EUR230K (exceptional EUR400K); TV fiction/series: EUR300K; Animation series: EUR330K

deadlines.frequency: Multiple sessions/year; must schedule meeting with coordinator 1 month before deadline
deadlines.notes: ~20 feature films, unitaires and fiction series co-produced per year

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Must have 30% financing for LM fiction, 40% for TV fiction at deposit. CNC co-financing rule: EUR1 CNC per EUR2 Region. 11 feature films and 14 TV fiction series targeted annually.

programmes.name: Fonds Documentaire (Pictanovo / Hauts-de-France)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR8.75M total; ~30 documentaries aided per year

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in regional spend

cap.display: Writing: EUR7.5K; Development: EUR7.5K; Production: contact Pictanovo

deadlines.notes: Must schedule meeting with coordinator 1 month before deadline

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Documentary de création with territorial and economic impact in Hauts-de-France.

programmes.name: Fonds Court Metrage (Pictanovo / Hauts-de-France)

annualBudget.display: Part of EUR8.75M total

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in regional spend

cap.display: EUR30K per project

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Short fiction, animation, documentary.

programmes.name: Fonds Ecriture et Developpement (Pictanovo / Hauts-de-France)

rate.display: Selective grant; up to 100% of pre-production costs

annualBudget.display: EUR1.14M (writing/development); EUR280K (emergence fund)

minSpend.display: N/A for writing; development requirements apply

cap.display: Writing: EUR15K (fiction), EUR7.5K (doc); Development: EUR15K (fiction), EUR7.5K (doc)

programmes.eligibility: Authors, screenwriters, production companies. Fiction, documentary, new media.

programmes.name: Aide a la Production de Longs Metrages Cinema - Fiction (Grand Est)

rate.display: Selective grant (3 tiers based on territorial anchoring)

annualBudget.display: Contact Region for total fund size

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in Grand Est spend (within 80% of production budget)

cap.display: Max anchoring: EUR300K; Majority anchoring: EUR200K; Minority anchoring: EUR100K

programmes.eligibility: Production companies eligible for CNC COSIP/agrément. Significant fabrication in Grand Est required. Total public aids <=50% of budget (60% for difficult/low-budget or cross-border European co-productions). Max 1/3 of fund per producer per year.

programmes.name: Aide a la Production de Longs Metrages Cinema - Documentaire (Grand Est)

rate.display: Selective grant (3 tiers based on territorial anchoring)

annualBudget.display: Contact Region for total fund size

minSpend.display: 160% of aid in Grand Est spend

cap.display: Max anchoring: EUR100K; Majority anchoring: EUR75K; Minority anchoring: EUR50K

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Long documentary films. Same public aid limits as fiction.

programmes.name: Aide a la Production de Courts Metrages Cinema (Grand Est)

annualBudget.display: Contact Region for total fund size

minSpend.display: 100% of aid in Grand Est spend

cap.display: EUR20K-40K per project

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Short fiction and documentary. Total public aids <=80% of budget.

programmes.name: Aide au Developpement et a la Production d'Oeuvres d'Animation (Grand Est)

annualBudget.display: Contact Region for total fund size

minSpend.display: Significant fabrication in Grand Est required

cap.display: Contact Region for exact amounts

programmes.eligibility: Production companies. Animation works (short, feature, series). Must mobilise regional resources and talent.

programmes.name: Cinema de Genre - Aide a l'Ecriture, Developpement et Production (Grand Est)

rate.display: Selective grant for genre cinema (horror, sci-fi, fantasy, thriller)

annualBudget.display: Dedicated envelope within Grand Est cinema fund

minSpend.display: Grand Est territorial requirements apply

cap.display: Contact Region for amounts

programmes.eligibility: Genre film projects (horror, sci-fi, fantasy, thriller). Writing, development and production stages.
